# Voix — French Learning Platform
# https://getvoix.com

## About
Voix is an AI-powered French language learning platform designed for serious learners preparing for internationally recognized French exams. The name "Voix" means "voice" in French (pronounced "vwa"), reflecting the platform's focus on speaking practice.

## Who It's For
- Adults preparing for TCF Canada (Test de Connaissance du Français) for Canadian permanent residence applications
- Learners preparing for DELF (Diplôme d'Études en Langue Française) at levels A1, A2, B1, B2
- Learners preparing for DALF (Diplôme Approfondi de Langue Française) at levels C1, C2
- Self-learners who want to improve French speaking, grammar, and sentence formation
- French language students at any CEFR level from A1 to C2

## Core Features
- AI-powered speaking practice: conversation mode and timed exam simulation mode
- Grammar exercises: tenses, active/passive voice, sentence formation — matched to CEFR level
- Full mock exams in TCF Canada, DELF, and DALF formats — timed and scored
- Level assessment quiz to identify your CEFR level (A1 through C2)
- Progress tracking: scores per skill area, daily streaks, improvement over time
- Freemium model: 10 exercises and 3 speaking sessions free daily; unlimited on paid plan

## CEFR Levels Supported
- A1 (Beginner): Basic phrases, self-introduction
- A2 (Elementary): Everyday conversations, routine tasks
- B1 (Intermediate): Travel, experiences, TCF minimum for many Canadian immigration streams
- B2 (Upper Intermediate): Complex topics, required for Quebec immigration programs
- C1 (Advanced): Professional and academic fluency, DALF C1
- C2 (Mastery): Complete command of French, DALF C2

## Exam Formats Covered
- TCF Canada: Required for Canadian permanent residence (Express Entry, PEQ, RNIP)
- DELF: Official French government diploma, levels A1–B2
- DALF: Advanced official French diploma, levels C1–C2
- TEF Canada: Test d'Évaluation de Français (coming soon)

## Technology
- Built with Next.js, MongoDB, and NextAuth
- AI powered by Google Gemini (free tier) and Claude Sonnet (premium)
- Speech recognition via Web Speech API (free) and OpenAI Whisper (premium)

## Key Pages
- / — Homepage and platform overview
- /levels — Choose your CEFR level (A1–C2)
- /level-test — Free 5-minute assessment quiz
- /exercises — Grammar and vocabulary exercises
- /speaking — AI speaking practice sessions
- /mock-exam — Full-length timed mock exams
- /blog — French learning guides, TCF/DELF tips, exam preparation articles
- /blog/tcf-canada-guide — Complete guide to TCF Canada exam
- /blog/delf-preparation — How to prepare for DELF at every level

## Content Policy
All exercise content is generated by AI and reviewed for accuracy against official CEFR guidelines and past DELF/DALF exam formats. Users can report inaccurate content for review.

## Contact
Website: https://getvoix.com
